initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT c.colour, COUNT(s.eye_colour_id) AS count
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
GROUP BY c.colour
ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT colour.colour, COUNT(superhero.eye_colour_id) AS count
FROM superhero
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
JOIN colour ON superhero.eye_colour_id = colour.id
WHERE publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
GROUP BY colour.colour
ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT c.colour, COUNT(s.eye_colour_id) AS count
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
GROUP BY c.colour
ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT 
    colour.colour, 
    COUNT(superhero.eye_colour_id) AS count
FROM 
    superhero
JOIN 
    publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
JOIN 
    colour ON superhero.eye_colour_id = colour.id
WHERE 
    publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
GROUP BY 
    colour.colour
ORDER BY 
    count DESC;
